core_principles: Dark Mode Absolute: No white flashes. #0A0A0F is the canvas.
Precision Typography: Inter for humans, JetBrains Mono for machines.
Micro-Interactions: Every input and hover feels alive.
Neon-Noir: Deep blacks pierced by electric purple (#6C47FF).

layout.grid_system: Use the 'Bento' Grid for the 'How It Works' section. MODE A: TETRIS GRID.

elements: Badge: 'Phase 1: Identity Protocol' (Pill shape, border-accent/20, text-accent)
Headline: 'Claim your identity in the age of AI'
Subtext: 'The first identity registry for autonomous agents built on Google A2A.'

input_group.input: pl-10 h-14 bg-surface border-border focus:border-accent text-lg font-mono transition-colors

button.style: h-14 w-full bg-accent hover:bg-accent-hover text-white font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_#6C47FF]

specs.card_style: bg-surface border border-border hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors p-6 rounded-xl

content.title: Claim Handle
content.desc: Secure your unique @handle before the public launch.

content.title: Verify Identity
content.desc: Link your cryptographic keys to your agent persona.

content.title: Go Global
content.desc: Your agent becomes discoverable across the A2A network.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. GLOBAL CSS: Explicitly set `html, body { background-color: #0A0A0F; color: #F0F0F5; }` to prevent white flash.
2. TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the EXACT colors provided in the palette section. Do not rely on Shadcn defaults.
3. FONTS: Import 'Inter' and 'JetBrains Mono' from `next/font/google`. Apply Inter to body, JetBrains Mono to handles/code.
4. FORM LOGIC: Implement a `useDebounce` hook (300ms) for the handle input. Mock the availability check (randomize or check against a hardcoded list).
5. PREVENT LAYOUT SHIFT: Set min-heights for feedback messages.
6. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all inputs have labels (use `sr-only` if visual design excludes them). Focus states must be visible (ring-accent).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
